name: Python
summary: Popular language for scripting and automation
description: Popular programming language for scripting, automation, web apps, and data work.
installCommand: pkg install -y python

name: Node.js
summary: JavaScript runtime for backend apps and CLIs
description: JavaScript runtime used for backend apps, CLIs, and tooling.
installCommand: pkg install -y nodejs

name: Git
summary: Version control for source code and projects
description: Distributed version control system for tracking code changes and collaborating.
installCommand: pkg install -y git

name: Neovim
summary: Modern terminal editor with plugin support
description: Modern terminal text editor with plugin support and a strong developer ecosystem.
installCommand: pkg install -y neovim

name: FFmpeg
summary: Toolkit for recording and converting media
description: Powerful toolkit for recording, converting, and streaming audio and video.
installCommand: pkg install -y ffmpeg

name: Nmap
summary: Network discovery and security auditing tool
description: Network discovery and security auditing tool for scanning hosts and services.
installCommand: pkg install -y nmap

name: Firefox
description: The desktop version of Firefox running in X11. Supports extensions and full web standards.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y firefox

name: AbiWord
description: A fully-featured, efficient word processor that runs natively in Termux X11. Supports .docx and .odt files.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y abiword

name: GIMP
description: A cross-platform image editor for photo retouching, image composition and image authoring.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y gimp

name: Geany
description: A small and lightweight Integrated Development Environment using the GTK+ toolkit.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y geany

name: PCManFM
summary: Extremely fast and lightweight file manager
description: The standard file manager for LXDE. Features tabbed browsing and a user-friendly interface.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y pcmanfm

name: XFCE Desktop
description: A lightweight desktop environment for UNIX-like operating systems. Provides a complete desktop experience.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y xfce4

name: VLC
description: A free and open-source cross-platform multimedia player and framework that plays most multimedia files.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y vlc

name: VS Code (OSS)
summary: Open-source version of VS Code editor
description: Powerful GUI code editor with support for extensions, debugging, and Git integration.
installCommand: pkg install -y tur-repo && pkg install -y code-oss

name: htop
description: An interactive system-monitor process-viewer and process-manager for Unix systems.
installCommand: pkg install -y htop

name: Transmission
description: A fast, easy, and free BitTorrent client. The GTK version provides a clean GUI for managing downloads.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y transmission-gtk

name: Audacious
description: An open-source audio player that is low on resource usage and high on audio quality.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y audacious

name: Inkscape
description: Professional vector graphics software for creating illustrations, icons, and diagrams in SVG format.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y inkscape

name: proot-distro
summary: Tool to manage Linux distributions in Termux
description: The gateway to running full Linux distros like Ubuntu or Debian to access software like LibreOffice.
installCommand: pkg install -y proot-distro

name: Viewnior
description: An image viewer created to be simple, fast and elegant. Its interface is clean and uncluttered.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y viewnior

name: Galculator
description: A scientific calculator supporting algebraic mode, RPN, and different number bases.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y galculator

name: XArchiver
description: GTK+ frontend to various command line archivers like zip, tar, and 7z.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y xarchiver

name: Leafpad
description: Weightless and simple text editor with a focus on speed and ease of use.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y leafpad

name: mpv player
summary: Free, open source, and cross-platform media player
description: Command-line media player with high-quality video output and hardware acceleration support.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y mpv

name: Ristretto
summary: Fast and lightweight image viewer for Xfce
description: An image viewer designed to be fast and low on resource consumption.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y ristretto

name: HexChat
description: Feature-rich IRC chat client that is easy to use and highly customizable.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y hexchat

name: XFCE Terminal
summary: Modern terminal emulator for the Xfce desktop
description: Lightweight and customizable terminal emulator with tab support.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y xfce4-terminal

name: Nitrogen
summary: Background browser and setter for X11
description: Fast and lightweight tool for setting your X11 desktop wallpaper.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y nitrogen

name: Midori
description: A fast and lightweight web browser that uses the WebKit engine.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y midori

name: KeePassXC
description: Securely store passwords, keys, and two-factor authentication codes natively in X11.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y keepassxc

name: Mousepad
description: An easy-to-use and fast text editor, the default for the Xfce desktop environment.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y mousepad

name: Disk Usage Analyzer
description: Provides a visual tree map of disk usage to help clean up storage.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y baobab

name: tmux
description: A powerful terminal multiplexer that lets you switch easily between several programs in one terminal.

name: Nano
description: A small, friendly text editor perfect for quick edits directly from the command line.

name: Wget
description: A non-interactive network downloader that supports HTTP, HTTPS, and FTP protocols.
installCommand: pkg install -y wget

name: cURL
summary: Command line tool for transferring data
description: A widely-used tool for transferring data with URLs. Essential for APIs and downloading.

description: A fast, minimalist CLI file manager that supports image previews and multi-pane views.

name: ncdu
description: A fast and highly efficient disk usage analyzer with an ncurses interface.
installCommand: pkg install -y ncdu

name: Z Shell
description: A highly customizable shell designed for interactive use and scripting. Great with Oh My Zsh.
installCommand: pkg install -y zsh

name: Fish Shell
summary: Smart and user-friendly command line shell
description: A smart, user-friendly shell with excellent auto-suggestions and syntax highlighting out of the box.
installCommand: pkg install -y fish

name: Openbox
summary: Highly configurable, next generation window manager
description: A lightweight and fast window manager for the X11 desktop environment.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y openbox

name: Rofi
summary: Window switcher, application launcher and dmenu replacement
description: A versatile and customizable application launcher and window switcher for X11.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y rofi

name: Polybar
description: A highly customizable status bar tool for X11 window managers like Openbox or i3.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y polybar

name: NetSurf

installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y netsurf

name: mtPaint
summary: Pixel art and image manipulation program
description: A lightweight painting program designed specifically for creating pixel art and manipulating indexed images.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y mtpaint

name: Zathura
description: A minimalist, keyboard-driven document and PDF viewer for X11.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y zathura

name: sxiv
description: A fast and minimalist image viewer for X11 with VI-like key bindings.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y sxiv

summary: MS-Explorer like file manager for X
description: A fast, lightweight, and Commander-like graphical file manager for X11.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y xfe

name: Zenity
summary: Display GTK+ dialogs from shell scripts
description: A tool that allows you to display GTK dialog boxes in commandline and shell scripts.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y zenity

name: XTerm
summary: Standard terminal emulator for the X Window System
description: The classic and robust standard terminal emulator for X11 environments.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y xterm

name: TigerVNC Viewer
description: Client application to connect to VNC servers and control remote desktops.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y tigervnc-viewer

name: Fastfetch
description: Like neofetch, but written in C for significantly better performance.
installCommand: pkg install -y fastfetch

name: Eza
description: A modern, maintained replacement for ls with colors, icons, and git integration.
installCommand: pkg install -y eza

name: Bat
description: A modern replacement for cat featuring syntax highlighting and Git integration.

name: fzf
description: An interactive Unix command-line fuzzy finder that can be used with any list.
installCommand: pkg install -y fzf

name: Ripgrep
description: A line-oriented search tool that recursively searches your current directory for a regex pattern.

name: jq
description: A lightweight and flexible command-line JSON processor.

name: OpenSSH

name: Clang

description: A fast and efficient C, C++, and Objective-C compiler.

name: Make
description: A tool which controls the generation of executables and other non-source files of a program.

name: Go
description: An open source programming language that makes it easy to build simple, reliable, and efficient software.
installCommand: pkg install -y golang

name: Rust
description: A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.
installCommand: pkg install -y rust

description: A GTK+ based configuration manager for the Openbox window manager.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y obconf

name: LXAppearance
description: A feature-rich GTK+ theme switcher of the LXDE Desktop for customizing X11 visuals.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y lxappearance

name: Dillo
description: A fast, small web browser completely written in C, C++ and FLTK. Ideal for slow devices.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y dillo

name: dmenu
description: A fast and lightweight dynamic menu for X, originally designed for dwm.

name: st (Simple Terminal)
description: A minimalist and incredibly lightweight terminal emulator for X11 environments.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y st

name: xclip

name: xcompmgr

name: feh
description: An X11 image viewer aimed mostly at console users. Can also be used to set desktop wallpapers.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y feh

name: tint2
description: A simple, unobtrusive, and light panel for X11 window managers like Openbox.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y tint2

name: FeatherPad
description: A lightweight and fast Qt-based plain-text editor with tabs, syntax highlighting, and a clean desktop interface.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y featherpad

name: FeatherNotes
description: A simple Qt note-taking application with rich text support, tabs, and an uncluttered interface.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y feathernotes

summary: Fast editor for web and code work
description: A powerful editor aimed at programmers and web developers, with support for many markup and programming languages.

description: A simple but capable text editor from GNOME with tabs, syntax highlighting, and plugin support.

description: A modern GTK text editor designed for the GNOME desktop, with a clean interface and solid defaults.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y gnome-text-editor

name: GNOME Calculator
description: A polished calculator for basic, scientific, financial, and programming tasks inside a GTK desktop session.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y gnome-calculator

name: GNOME Clocks
summary: World clock, stopwatch, and timer app
description: A simple desktop clock utility with alarms, timers, stopwatch features, and world clock support.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y gnome-clocks

name: GNOME Screenshot
summary: Screen capture tool for GTK desktops
description: A straightforward screenshot utility for capturing windows, regions, or full desktop views in X11.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y gnome-screenshot

name: Eye of GNOME
description: A straightforward image viewer for browsing, zooming, and inspecting pictures in a GTK desktop environment.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y eog

name: Evince
summary: Document viewer for PDF and more
description: A versatile GNOME document viewer for PDF, PostScript, DjVu, and other common document formats.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y evince

name: File Roller
description: A GTK archive manager for opening, creating, and extracting zip, tar, and other common archive formats.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y file-roller

name: Flameshot
description: A feature-rich screenshot app with instant annotation, drawing tools, and easy saving for X11 desktops.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y flameshot

name: ghostwriter
description: A distraction-free Markdown editor with preview support and a writing-focused desktop interface.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y ghostwriter

name: GHex
description: A GTK hex editor for inspecting and editing binary files visually on the desktop.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y ghex

name: GPicView
description: A fast and minimal image viewer from the LXDE ecosystem for quick picture browsing on lightweight desktops.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y gpicview

name: Thunar
summary: Modern XFCE file manager for X11
description: A fast, polished file manager from the XFCE desktop with tabs, bulk rename support, and removable media handling.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y thunar

name: Parole
description: A simple media player built for XFCE with support for audio, video, playlists, and desktop-friendly playback controls.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y parole

name: PulseAudio Volume Control
description: A graphical volume control utility for managing output devices, input devices, application streams, and audio levels.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y pavucontrol

name: Atril
summary: MATE document viewer for PDFs and more
description: A desktop document viewer from the MATE project with support for PDF, EPUB, DjVu, and other common reading formats.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y atril

name: XFCE Task Manager
description: An XFCE system monitor for checking processes, CPU usage, and memory usage from a lightweight desktop window.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y xfce4-taskmanager

name: Engrampa
summary: Archive manager from the MATE desktop
description: A graphical archive tool for browsing, extracting, and creating zip, tar, and other compressed file formats.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y engrampa

name: Pluma
summary: MATE text editor with classic desktop feel
description: A reliable GUI text editor descended from gedit, with tabs, syntax highlighting, and a traditional desktop workflow.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y pluma

name: MATE Calculator
description: A full-featured calculator for basic, scientific, programming, and financial calculations inside a GUI desktop session.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y mate-calc

name: Okular
summary: KDE document viewer for many formats
description: A capable Qt document viewer for PDFs, comics, EPUBs, and more, with annotations, navigation, and presentation features.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y okular

name: Audacity
description: A full audio editing application for recording, trimming, mixing, and exporting sound projects from a GUI workflow.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y audacity

name: Thunderbird
description: A feature-rich mail application with multiple accounts, message search, calendars, and a classic desktop communication workflow.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y thunderbird

name: Telegram Desktop
summary: Official Telegram client for desktop chat
description: A native desktop client for Telegram with chat sync, file sharing, media previews, and multi-account messaging support.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y telegram-desktop

name: Pidgin
description: A long-standing desktop messaging client that supports multiple chat protocols through plugins and account integrations.
installCommand: pkg install -y x11-repo && pkg install -y pidgin

name: Endcord
summary: Discord client that explicitly supports Termux
description: A third-party Discord client that runs in the terminal and documents Termux support, including notifications through Termux:API. Discord may restrict third-party clients, so use at your own risk.
installCommand:
pkg install -y git python uv termux-api && rm -rf $PREFIX/opt/endcord && git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/sparklost/endcord.git $PREFIX/opt/endcord && printf '#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
cd "$PREFIX/opt/endcord"
exec uv run main.py "$@"
' > $PREFIX/bin/endcord && chmod 755 $PREFIX/bin/endcord

name: Termux Background
summary: Community Termux background plugin with Android companion app
description: Adds custom background images, blur, opacity controls, and live reload to Termux. The CLI installs in Termux and the Android companion APK is still needed to finish setup.
installCommand: pkg install -y wget termux-api && wget -O $TMPDIR/termux-background.deb https://github.com/Justadudeinspace/termux-background/releases/download/version-1.0.0/termux-background_1.0.0_all.deb && dpkg -i $TMPDIR/termux-background.deb && printf '\nInstall the Termux Background Android APK from the GitHub releases page to finish setup.\n'

name: Termux GUI Package Manager
summary: Graphical package manager built for Termux:GUI
description: A community package manager for Termux and proot-distro environments that uses Termux:GUI. It needs Python, the termuxgui bindings, and the Termux:GUI Android app.
installCommand: pkg install -y python curl && pip install --upgrade termuxgui && curl -fsSL https://github.com/tareksander/termux-gui-pm/releases/download/1.0.0/termux-gui-pm -o $PREFIX/bin/termux-gui-pm && chmod 755 $PREFIX/bin/termux-gui-pm && printf '\nInstall the Termux:GUI Android app from GitHub Releases before launching this app.\n'

name: Dextop
summary: Community workstation setup for Termux and containers
description: A polished Termux workstation installer that sets up a desktop workflow, companion apps, and optional container integration. It is aimed at turning Android into a Linux-style workstation.
installCommand: pkg install -y curl && curl -s -L run.dxtp.app > $HOME/dextop && bash $HOME/dextop

name: Termux Desktop (Community)
summary: Classic community desktop setup for Termux
description: A well-known community script that builds an Openbox and VNC desktop environment inside Termux. The upstream project is archived, but it is still useful for users who want the original one-command setup.
installCommand: pkg upgrade -y && pkg install -y git && rm -rf $PREFIX/opt/termux-desktop && git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/adi1090x/termux-desktop.git $PREFIX/opt/termux-desktop && cd $PREFIX/opt/termux-desktop && chmod +x setup.sh && ./setup.sh --install
